name: Cheddar Chili Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F.
Butter a 9-inch springform pan.
Mix breadcrumbs and 1/4 cup cheddar cheese.
Sprinkle the mixture into the pan, turning to coat.
Refrigerate.
Dice about half of the ham; reserve the remaining slices.
Mix the diced ham with the remaining ingredients in a blender or processor until smooth.
Pour slightly more than half of the filling into the prepared pan.
Top with the reserved ham slices in an even layer.
Cover with the remaining filling.
Place the pan on a baking sheet.
Bake for 1 1/4 hours.
Turn off the oven and cool the cheesecake about 1 hour with the door ajar.
Transfer the cheesecake to a rack.
Remove the sides of the pan.
Cool to room temperature before serving.
